soulValue.Wiki: The souls given upon this boss's defeat.

soulBulletId.Wiki: The bullet triggers upon this boss's defeat.

itemLotId.Wiki: The item lot given upon this boss's defeat.

itemLotIdMultiPlay.Wiki: The item lot given upon this boss's defeat when in multiplayer.

killedEventId.Wiki: The event flag set upon this boss's defeat every time.

onceKilledEventId.Wiki: The event flag set upon this boss's defeat for the first time. Never unset.

bonfireEventValueId.Wiki: The event value associated with the bonfire linked to this boss.

cameraParamId.Wiki: The camera parameters to use when facing this boss.

lockParamId.Wiki: The lock-on parameters to use when facing this boss.

hpDispType1.Wiki: The HP display type for slot 1.

hpDispType2.Wiki: The HP display type for slot 2.

hpDispType3.Wiki: The HP display type for slot 3.

killFeType.Wiki: The kill effect that occurs on the boss defeat.

genEventGroupId1.Wiki: The generator event group for slot 1.

genEventGroupId2.Wiki: The generator event group for slot 2.

genEventGroupId3.Wiki: The generator event group for slot 3.

roundSoulDropCategory.Wiki: The soul drop category for this boss.

bossNameTextId1.Wiki: The boss name text for slot 1.

bossNameTextId2.Wiki: The boss name text for slot 2.

bossNameTextId3.Wiki: The boss name text for slot 3.

feDispWaitTime.Wiki: The duration before the kill effect occurs upon boss defeat.

bonfireId.Wiki: The bonfire parameters associated with this boss.

decLimitTime.Wiki: The amount of time limit reduction that occurs in multiplayer upon boss defeat.
